## Diagram 2

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  S([start]) --> GetSetting["system_config.get_system_configuration_setting(cursor, DDA_LOCATION_VISIBILITY, solution_id)"]
  GetSetting --> BuildSet["for location_id in location_ids: if qualifier in location_id -> json.loads(...) -> update location_set"]
  BuildSet --> IsEmpty{"location_set empty?"}
  IsEmpty -->|yes| ClauseFalse["visibility_clause = ' AND false '"]
  ClauseFalse --> ReturnFalse["return visibility_clause"]
  IsEmpty -->|no| ClauseBuild["compose AND NOT EXISTS(... ) AND true = ANY(... ) clause"]
  ClauseBuild --> BindData["data['dda_location_visibility_set'] = tuple(location_set)"]
  BindData --> ReturnClause["return visibility_clause"]
  ReturnClause --> E([end])
```
